items.situation: two students chatting about a part-time job one just started at a warehouse

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hey, you started that warehouse packing job, right? How's it going?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Honestly, it's exhausting. I'm on my feet for eight hours, and the shifts are mostly late at night.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Late nights? Doesn't that wreck your class schedule?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: That's the thing. I keep dozing off in my morning lecture, and my grades are starting to slip.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: That sounds rough. Maybe ask your supervisor about switching to weekend shifts?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Yeah, I think I have to. The money's good, but it's not worth failing a course over.

questions.stem: What are the speakers mainly discussing?

options.A: The drawbacks of the man's new job
options.B: How to find a part-time job on campus
options.C: The man's decision to drop a course
options.D: A disagreement about working night shifts

questions.explanation: 对话围绕这份工作带来的疲惫与影响成绩等弊端，A 正确。B 找工作未谈；C 他只是担心挂科并非决定退课；D 两人并无争执。

questions.stem: What will the man most likely do?

options.B: Stop going to his morning lecture
options.C: Ask to change his work shifts
options.D: Hire a tutor for the course

questions.explanation: 他认同要找主管换成周末班，C 正确。A 立刻辞职过度推断；B 是问题不是打算；D 请家教未提。

items.situation: two friends sharing cooking tips while grocery shopping

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: These tomatoes look great. I'm finally going to try making that pasta sauce.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Oh, nice! Quick tip: add a pinch of sugar to balance the acidity. It makes a huge difference.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Sugar? In a tomato sauce? I never would've guessed.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Trust me. And let it simmer on low for at least an hour. Don't rush it.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: An hour, okay. I usually get impatient and crank up the heat.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: That's the mistake. High heat turns it bitter. Low and slow is the real secret.

questions.stem: What does the woman suggest adding to the sauce?
questions.explanation: 她建议加少许糖来中和酸味，B 正确。A、C 罗勒和橄榄油未提及；D 黑胡椒是改动的细节。

questions.stem: What will the man most likely do differently this time?

options.A: Buy a jar of canned sauce instead
options.D: Cook the sauce over low heat

questions.explanation: 他过去爱开大火，现在会改用小火慢炖，D 正确。A 买现成酱无关；B 加更多番茄未提；C 跳过慢炖与建议相反。

items.situation: two students chatting about an art class one just signed up for

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: I just signed up for that weekend pottery class at the community center.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Pottery? I took the watercolor one there last term. Did they make you buy your own supplies?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: That's exactly what I wanted to ask. The flyer wasn't clear about it.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: For watercolor, the basic materials were included, but you paid extra for the nicer brushes.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Good to know. I'll bring some cash in case the clay tools cost extra.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Smart. Email the instructor too. They answered all my questions really fast.

questions.stem: What class did the man take previously?
questions.explanation: 男生说上学期上过水彩课，C 正确。A 陶艺是女生报的；B、D 园艺和摄影都未提及。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do?

options.A: Bring extra money to the class

questions.explanation: 她打算带些现金以防工具另收费，A 正确。B 取消报名过度推断；C 买贵画笔是水彩课的情况；D 换课无依据。

items.situation: two friends deciding whether to buy concert tickets now or wait

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Did you see the band we both like is playing here next month?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Yes! But the tickets are kind of pricey right now. Should we wait a bit?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: I've heard prices sometimes drop closer to the date, if a show doesn't sell out.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: True, but this band is really popular. It could easily sell out within days.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Good point. I'd rather pay a little more than miss it completely.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Same here. Let's just grab them tonight before they're gone.

questions.stem: Why is the woman hesitant to buy the tickets right now?

options.A: She is not free on that night
options.B: She does not really like the band
options.C: She has already seen them perform
options.D: The tickets are expensive at the moment

questions.explanation: 她说现在票价偏贵，故而犹豫，D 正确。A 时间冲突未提；B 与两人都喜欢相反；C 看过演出未提。

questions.stem: What will the speakers most likely do?

options.A: Wait until the prices drop later
options.D: Ask other friends to buy them

questions.explanation: 两人决定今晚就买，B 正确。A 等降价被否决；C 换演出无依据；D 让别人买是无关步骤。

items.situation: two students comparing how they get to campus

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: You bike to campus every day, right? Isn't that exhausting?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Not really. It's faster than the bus, and I skip the crowded stops.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: I take the bus, but lately it's always packed and running late.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: That's why I switched. Though when it rains, I admit I really miss the dry bus.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Yeah, the weather's the catch. Maybe I'll try walking on nice days.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Walking's great if you have the time. It's about thirty minutes from the dorms.

questions.stem: What are the speakers mainly talking about?

options.A: Different ways of getting to campus
options.B: A problem with the campus bus schedule
options.C: How to stay fit while commuting

questions.explanation: 两人比较骑车、坐公交、步行等通勤方式，A 正确。B 公交只是其一，过窄；C 健身偏题；D 与他喜欢骑车相反。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do on a sunny day?

options.A: Buy a bicycle of her own
options.D: Ask the man for a ride

questions.explanation: 她说天气好时想试着步行，C 正确。A 买自行车过度推断；B 继续坐拥挤公交被她想避开；D 搭车无依据。
